sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ أَخِي بِصُدَاعٍ، لِذَلِكَ ذَهَبَ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je osjetio glavobolju, pa je otišao u apoteku.
sentences.translationEn: My brother felt a headache, so he went to the pharmacy.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut mu je dao odgovarajući lijek za bol.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave him the appropriate medicine for the pain.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْهُ قِرَاءَةَ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ بِعِنَايَةٍ قَبْلَ تَنَاوُلِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio ga je da pažljivo pročita uputstva prije uzimanja lijeka.
sentences.translationEn: He asked him to read the instructions carefully before taking the medicine.
